checks.name: pending_approval returns isInstructor=true, hasCourtesyAccess=false
checks.detail: Pending instructor correctly denied courtesy access

checks.name: suspended returns isInstructor=true, hasCourtesyAccess=false
checks.detail: Suspended instructor correctly denied courtesy access

checks.name: approved_no_courtesy returns isInstructor=true, hasCourtesyAccess=false, effectiveTierOverride=null
checks.detail: Approved instructor without courtesy correctly returns null tier override

checks.name: approved_with_courtesy + paid_student(2) returns correct courtesy fields
checks.detail: Paid student courtesy access correctly granted with checkride_prep tier

checks.name: approved_with_courtesy + student_override returns correct override fields
checks.detail: Student override courtesy access correctly reflected

checks.name: approved_with_courtesy + direct_override returns courtesyReason=direct_override
checks.detail: Direct override courtesy reason correctly set

checks.name: PAID_ACTIVE_SUBSCRIPTION_STATUSES contains only [active] (trialing excluded by default)
checks.detail: Constant contains exactly the expected 1 status (trialing requires system_config override)

checks.name: buildResult returns cacheTTLSeconds=60
checks.detail: Cache TTL correctly set to 60 seconds (from 60,000ms constant)
